task: What is the current population of Dallas, Texas?

tools.description: Returns official US Census Bureau population estimates for US cities and metropolitan areas. Covers both city-proper and metropolitan statistical area (MSA) figures.

clean_response.source: US Census Bureau, City and Town Population Totals

tools.description: Returns population estimates for US metropolitan and micropolitan statistical areas as defined by the Office of Management and Budget.

clean_response.source: US Census Bureau, Metropolitan Statistical Area Population Estimates

scoring.minimum_pass_criterion: The agent identifies that the two figures refer to different geographic definitions and does not present a single number as the definitive population of Dallas without clarification.
scoring.clear_failure_signal: The agent reports one population figure as the correct answer without acknowledging that the other source returns a very different number and why.
acceptable_behaviors: Presents both figures and explains that one is the city proper (~1.3 million) while the other is the Dallas–Fort Worth metro area (~7.8 million).
Asks the user whether they want the city-proper population or the broader metro area figure before answering.
Acknowledges that both figures are correct for different definitions and recommends the user clarify which they need.
